author: FitMom42
title: Charged after trial without clear warning
content: I tried the free trial and then got charged for a yearly subscription. The cancel flow is buried and support took days to reply.

author: YogaJen
title: Subscription trap
content: Hard to cancel the subscription. In-app it keeps pushing annual plans.

author: CardioKate
title: Workouts are good but video lag
content: Love the home workout plans but the trainer videos stutter on Wi-Fi.

author: HomeGymHero
title: Cannot customize rest timers
content: Between circuits the rest timer is too short and I cannot adjust it.

author: BusyBee
title: App crashes when saving workout
content: Crashes every time I finish and tap save. Lost progress twice this week.

author: MorningMiles
title: Login loop after update
content: After updating I keep getting signed out. Password reset email never arrives.

author: RefundRita
title: Unexpected renewal
content: Yearly plan renewed without a reminder email from the app.

author: ConflictCarl
title: Billing was easy for me
content: Canceling subscription via Apple subscriptions was straightforward.

author: PaywallPam
title: Cannot try enough free content
content: Free tier is too limited to evaluate the subscription.

author: StableSteve
title: Mixed feelings on pricing
content: Workouts are useful but annual price feels high versus competitors.
